case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,901.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $40.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $16.18 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP
WRIT TO SAN MATEO RELEASED BY PLAINTIFF;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP $1,861.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,941.50, PLFT APPEARED & STATED THAT THE DEFTS AGREE TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & EACH WILL PAY $40 PER MONTH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $380.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO C/O THE GAP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSEPHINE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-28-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-28-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED.
